name: pingpt-extension
description: Pin individual ChatGPT messages or entire chats. Add custom names and tags, search instantly, and jump back to the original conversation. Features dark mode support and ultra-fast serverless API powered by Hono.

scripts.copy:frontend-icons: mkdirp frontend/images && cpx "assets/icons/favicon-*.png" frontend/images && cpx "assets/icons/favicon.ico" frontend/images
scripts.copy:icons: npm run copy:extension-icons && npm run copy:frontend-icons
scripts.build:chrome: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:icons && rimraf build/chrome && mkdirp build/chrome && cpx "extension/common/**" build/chrome && cpx "extension/chrome/*" build/chrome && node scripts/prepend-browser.js chrome build/chrome && node scripts/build-background.js build/chrome && node scripts/replace-browser-text.js chrome build/chrome/popup.html
scripts.build:firefox: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:icons && rimraf build/firefox && mkdirp build/firefox && cpx "extension/common/**" build/firefox && cpx "extension/firefox/*" build/firefox && node scripts/prepend-browser.js firefox build/firefox && node scripts/build-background.js build/firefox && node scripts/replace-browser-text.js firefox build/firefox/popup.html
scripts.build:ext: npm run clean && npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:assets && npm run copy:frontend-icons
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:ext
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run pack:chrome && npm run pack:firefox
